# Materia

> Materia is an evidence-graded reference for remedies organized by body part. A layered, clickable human body leads into a knowledge graph of body, condition, remedy, compound, and study, with every remedy evidence-graded and study-cited. Ad-free, not medical advice.

Static Astro site at materia.significanthobbies.com. Content collections are hand-editable markdown with structured frontmatter linking body parts to conditions to remedies to compounds to studies.

## Product

- [Home](https://materia.significanthobbies.com/): Interactive body explorer and landing
- [Body parts](https://materia.significanthobbies.com/parts): Browse remedies by anatomical system
- [Conditions](https://materia.significanthobbies.com/conditions): Browse remedies by condition
- [Remedies](https://materia.significanthobbies.com/remedies): Evidence-graded remedy profiles
- [Compounds](https://materia.significanthobbies.com/compounds): Active compound profiles
- [Studies](https://materia.significanthobbies.com/studies): Cited research studies
- [Methodology](https://materia.significanthobbies.com/methodology): How evidence grades are assigned
- [About](https://materia.significanthobbies.com/about): Project background and scope
- [Privacy](https://materia.significanthobbies.com/privacy): Privacy policy
- [Terms](https://materia.significanthobbies.com/terms): Terms of use

## Source

- [GitHub — materia](https://github.com/sarthak-fleet/materia): Monorepo (Astro static site, content collections, body explorer)

## Optional

- [Foundry](https://sassmaker.com): Fleet showcase
- [Sarthak Agrawal](https://sarthakagrawal.dev): Builder portfolio
